sessions.intent: Design Setup.goal run-once execution system for Runtime2

before.assumptions: Runtime1 had RunSetup/HasExecuted system. Runtime2 needs equivalent with OBP-compliant design.

sessions.plan: Trace runtime1 setup system, design OBP-compliant Setup object with Executions smart collection, write handoff spec for coder.

actions.context: Architect handoff spec for Setup.goal system

after.health: Design spec ready for coder implementation
after.notes: Key decisions: Setup is an object not a filter, Executions wraps sqlite table, context.Setup propagates through goal.call, Steps.RunAsync owns iteration.

sessions.intent: Implement Setup.goal run-once execution system per architect handoff

before.assumptions: Architect spec is sound. EngineGoals.Setup is currently IEnumerable<Goal>, needs to become Setup object. Steps needs RunAsync. PLangContext needs Setup property.
before.risk: Low — well-defined spec, familiar patterns (SqliteDataSource). Medium risk on excluding setup goals from regular lookup (may break callers).

sessions.plan: Create Setup/this.cs (uses engine.System.DataSource, no separate Executions class), add PLangContext.Setup, modify EngineGoals.Setup property, add Steps.RunAsync with setup check, refactor Goal.RunAsync to delegate, wire up in Executor.Run2, write C# tests.

actions.context: Setup object with Goals, RunAsync, IsExecuted, Record — uses engine.System.DataSource instead of separate Executions class
EngineGoals.Setup becomes object, PLangContext.Setup added, Steps.RunAsync with run-once check, Goal.RunAsync delegates to Steps (OBP rule 5), Executor.Run2 calls Setup before main goal
9 tests: goal ordering, exclusion from lookup, IsExecuted/Record, skip already-executed, hash change re-run, context propagation, Clone
Updated existing Setup test to use goals.Setup.Goals.ToList() instead of goals.Setup.ToList()

after.notes: Simplified from architect's design: no Executions class, uses engine.System.DataSource directly. Discussed with Ingi — table name is 'setup', using existing DataSource was always the intent.

sessions.intent: Analyze Setup.goal run-once system and DataSource/Settings bridge code

before.assumptions: Coder implemented architect spec. Tests passing. Need to check OBP compliance, behavioral correctness, and test coverage gaps.
before.risk: Low — analysis only, no code changes

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis: OBP compliance, simplification, readability, behavioral reasoning (focus on record-on-failure semantics), deletion tests.

actions.context: Full 5-pass analysis. Found 2 behavioral issues in setup record-on-failure path, 1 consistency issue in EngineGoals.

after.health: FAIL — two behavioral issues need fixing
after.notes: Finding 1 (High): failed setup steps permanently recorded as executed. Finding 2 (Medium): Record silently swallows errors. Finding 3 (Low): Count/All vs Get inconsistency.

sessions.intent: Fix 3 code analyzer findings in Setup.goal system

before.assumptions: Code analyzer found 3 issues: record-on-failure, swallowed errors, API inconsistency. All are behavioral fixes, not architectural.
before.risk: Low — targeted fixes to existing code, well-covered by tests

sessions.plan: Fix Finding 1: move record call after step execution, only record on success/tolerated. Fix Finding 2: change Record return to Task<Data>. Fix Finding 3: add AllIncludingSetup, filter All/Count/Value. Add 2 tests for record-on-failure semantics.

actions.context: Record only on success or tolerated errors (step.OnError?.IgnoreError). Failed steps must re-run on next startup.
Record returns Task<Data> instead of Task, surfacing DataSource errors.
AllIncludingSetup internal property for Setup.Goals. All/Count/Value exclude setup goals.
Added RunAsync_FailedStepNotRecorded and RunAsync_ToleratedErrorStepIsRecorded tests.

after.notes: All 3 code analyzer findings addressed. Record-on-failure semantics verified with 2 new tests.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder v2 fixes for Setup.goal system

before.assumptions: Coder addressed all 3 v1 findings. Need to verify fixes are correct and no new issues introduced.

sessions.plan: Verify each fix against v1 findings. Check for new OBP violations or behavioral issues in the fix code itself.

actions.context: All 3 findings addressed correctly. Record-on-failure logic correct, Record returns Data, AllIncludingSetup is internal. No new issues.

sessions.intent: Deep re-analysis of entire branch — cross-concern behavioral review

before.assumptions: v1/v2 focused on Setup system. Full branch includes DataSource, SettingsData bridge, LazyParamsGenerator changes, MemoryStack changes. Need to trace cross-system interactions.

sessions.plan: Trace full execution path from Executor.Run2 through RunGoalAsync, Goal.RunAsync, Steps.RunAsync, LazyParamsGenerator __Resolve to verify which MemoryStack %Settings.X% resolves against. Check actor context wiring.

actions.context: Traced execution path end-to-end. SettingsData registered only on System actor, but engine.Context = User.Context. %Settings.X% unreachable from PLang code. All 15 test references use System.Context.MemoryStack, masking the gap.

after.health: FAIL — SettingsData bridge unreachable from PLang execution
after.notes: Finding 1 (High): %Settings.ApiKey% silently resolves to null because SettingsData lives on System.Context.MemoryStack but execution uses User.Context.MemoryStack. Settings action handlers work because they bypass MemoryStack and access Engine.System.DataSource directly.

sessions.intent: Share SettingsData across all actors — fix %Settings.X% unreachable from PLang code

before.assumptions: Code analyzer found SettingsData only on System actor. Ingi confirmed: settings are runtime-wide, all actors should share the same object.

sessions.plan: Engine owns single SettingsData instance. Actor always registers it (remove System-only check). Fix all tests to use User context. Add shared-object reference equality test.

actions.context: Added internal SettingsVariable property, created in constructor
Removed System-only if block, always registers engine.SettingsVariable on MemoryStack
All tests now use _engine.Context.MemoryStack (User context). Added SameObjectAcrossAllActors and SetViaSystem_ReadableFromUserContext tests.

after.notes: All actors share same SettingsData reference. %Settings.X% now works in PLang code.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder v3 fix for SettingsData sharing across actors

before.assumptions: Coder moved SettingsData ownership to Engine, all actors register same instance. Need to verify fix correctness and no new issues.

sessions.plan: Verify Engine.SettingsVariable ownership, Actor registration, test coverage, constructor ordering safety.

actions.context: Fix correct. Engine owns single SettingsData, all actors share it, tests use User context, constructor ordering safe (lazy access). Two new tests prove cross-actor sharing.

after.notes: Clean. All v3 findings addressed. Branch ready for merge.

sessions.intent: Test quality review of Setup.goal run-once system + SettingsData sharing fix

before.assumptions: Code analyzer v4 approved. Coder at v3. Setup has 11 C# tests. PLang tests should be 23/23.
before.risk: Low — reviewing well-tested feature with code analyzer approval.

sessions.plan: Run C# tests (1478), run PLang tests (23 from Tests/Runtime2/), run coverage, analyze test quality for false greens and missing coverage, focus on Setup record-on-failure semantics and SettingsData cross-actor sharing.

actions.context: Full code review of Setup system and SettingsData sharing. Found Record return value discarded at call site.
Test quality analysis: 11 Setup tests solid, skip test weak, no PLang integration test for setup.
Tester v3 artifacts: test report, verdict (pass), summary

after.health: C# tests: 1478/1478, PLang tests: 23/23. Verdict: PASS.
after.notes: One notable gap: Steps.RunAsync discards Record() return value. Minor: skip test weak, no PLang setup test, cancellation untested.

sessions.intent: Fix tester v3 findings: Record abort, skip proof, cancellation test, setup-tolerable errors

before.assumptions: Tester found 3 gaps: F1 (Record return discarded), F2 (skip test weak), F4 (cancellation untested). Runtime1 tolerates 'already exists' and 'duplicate column name' during setup.
before.risk: Low — behavioral fixes with clear test requirements

sessions.plan: F1: check Record() return, abort on failure. Add IsTolerableError matching runtime1 patterns. F2: use DataSource marker to prove step was skipped. F4: pre-cancelled token test.

actions.context: Added IsTolerableError: 'already exists', 'duplicate column name' match (runtime1 parity)
Unified tolerance check (success/IgnoreError/IsTolerableError). Record return checked, abort on failure.
7 new/rewritten tests: skip proof via marker, Record abort, cancellation, 5 IsTolerableError tests

after.notes: All 3 tester findings addressed. Runtime1 setup tolerance ported.

sessions.intent: Verify coder v4 fixes for tester v3 findings (F1, F2, F4)

before.assumptions: Coder addressed all 3 findings. 1485 C# tests reported passing.

sessions.plan: Run C# tests, run PLang tests, verify each fix addresses the original finding, check for regressions.

actions.context: All 3 fixes verified: Record abort, marker-based skip proof, cancellation test. IsTolerableError bonus is clean.

after.health: C# tests: 1485/1485, PLang tests: 23/23. Verdict: PASS.
after.notes: All findings addressed. No new issues.

sessions.intent: First auditor review of Setup.goal run-once execution system + SettingsData sharing

before.assumptions: Coder v4 and Tester v4 both PASS. 1485 C# tests, 23 PLang tests all green. Code analyzer v4 approved SettingsData fix. No previous auditor review exists.
before.risk: Medium — first full code review of a new subsystem. Setup touches Executor, Goals, Steps, Context — cross-cutting concerns.

sessions.plan: Review all changed files against OBP rules. Verify contract consistency across Get/GetAsync/GetByPrPathAsync. Trace Executor.Run2 setup execution path. Check error handling convention compliance. Verify test assertions catch real bugs. Run tests independently.

actions.context: Full auditor review. Found 2 major contract gaps: GetAsync doesn't filter IsSetup (disk-loaded setup goals bypass filter), Executor.Run2 calls Setup.RunAsync before any goals loaded (setup silently does nothing). 1 minor: 'setup' goal name reserved without documentation.

after.notes: Infrastructure is well-built (OBP compliant, error handling correct, good test coverage for the code that exists). But two contract gaps: GetAsync leaks setup goals, and Executor.Run2 has no goal discovery before calling Setup.RunAsync. Verdict: FAIL.

sessions.intent: Fix auditor v4 findings: IsSetup filter gaps in GetAsync/GetByPrPathAsync, goal loading order in Executor.Run2

before.assumptions: Auditor found 2 major + 1 minor issue. F1: GetAsync/GetByPrPathAsync don't filter IsSetup on disk loads. F2: Goals not loaded before Setup.RunAsync. F3: 'setup' name unconditionally reserved.
before.risk: Low — targeted fixes to well-understood code paths. Tests will validate each fix.

sessions.plan: F1: Add `if (loaded is { IsSetup: true }) return null;` at all disk-load return paths in GetAsync (2 paths) and GetByPrPathAsync (cache + disk). Fix GetByPrPathAsync cache check to return null immediately for setup goals. F2: Verify LoadFromDirectoryAsync is before Setup.RunAsync (already was). F3: Add `&& engine.Goals.Setup.Goals.Any()` guard. Add 5 new GoalsTests.

actions.context: F1: Added IsSetup filter at 4 return points: GetAsync relative load (line ~120), GetAsync root load (line ~138), GetByPrPathAsync cache (line ~221), GetByPrPathAsync disk load (line ~237). Cache check changed from `&& !cached.IsSetup` to `return cached.IsSetup ? null : cached;` to prevent fallthrough NPE.
F2: Verified LoadFromDirectoryAsync before Setup.RunAsync. F3: Changed setup interceptor to conditional on Setup.Goals.Any().

Added 5 tests: Get_ExcludesSetupGoals, GetAsync_ReturnsNull_ForSetupGoalLoadedFromDisk, GetAsync_ReturnsGoal_ForNonSetupGoalLoadedFromDisk, GetByPrPathAsync_ReturnsNull_ForSetupGoal, GetByPrPathAsync_ReturnsNull_ForCachedSetupGoal

after.notes: All 3 auditor findings addressed. Bonus bug found and fixed: cached setup goal in GetByPrPathAsync fell through to disk load path causing NullReferenceException. Test caught it before the fix was applied.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder v5 fixes for auditor v4 findings (IsSetup filter, goal loading, setup interception)

before.assumptions: Coder v5 addressed all 3 findings from auditor v4. Need to verify fixes are correct, no regressions, and no new issues.
before.risk: Low — targeted re-review of specific fixes

sessions.plan: Read coder v5 summary, verify each fix at the code level (4 IsSetup filter points, LoadFromDirectoryAsync ordering, conditional setup check). Run tests. Check new tests catch the right things.

actions.context: All 3 findings properly fixed. IsSetup filter at 4 return paths, LoadFromDirectoryAsync before Setup.RunAsync, conditional setup interception. Bonus bug fix in GetByPrPathAsync cache path. 5 new tests. 1490 total passing.

after.health: PASS — all findings addressed, no new issues
after.notes: Clean review. Branch ready for merge.
